context: Evaluates implementation of clangd compiler flag generation for MQL4/5 projects. The candidate must generate the correct base flags, correctly transform them for MQL4 vs MQL5, and merge flags without duplicates.

checklist.name: compat header insertion
checklist.description: When compatHeaderPath is provided, the -include<path> flag is inserted at position 4 (after -D__MQL5__), not appended at the end

checklist.name: MQL4 flag transformation
checklist.description: generateProjectFlags with 'mql4' replaces -D__MQL5__ with -D__MQL4__ and appends -D__MQL4_BUILD__; does not mutate the input array

checklist.name: MQL5 flag transformation
checklist.description: generateProjectFlags with 'mql5' appends only -D__MQL5_BUILD__ without replacing any flags

checklist.name: Flag merging without duplicates
checklist.description: mergeFlags returns a combined array with no duplicate flags and no empty/non-string entries; preserves original order
